sub_modules.qgemm_quantizer: Combinational FP32-to-integer quantization stage that returns zero-point-centered rounded integer values.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer-domain VLEN by VLEN matrix multiplication over K using INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantizer: Combinational fixed-point scale dequantization stage that converts INT32 accumulators back to packed IEEE-754 FP32 bit patterns.
